options.name: --artifacts-directory
options.description: The output directory path for artifacts.

options.name: --build-commit
options.description: Build the manifest from the specified commit.

options.name: --build-tag
options.description: Build the manifest from the specified tag.

options.name: --build-file
options.description: Build the manifest from the specified file.

options.name: --git-directory
options.description: The directory containing the git repository.

options.name: --package-author
options.description: The package author for the output nuget package.

options.name: --package-summary
options.description: The package description for the output nuget package.

options.name: --package-id
options.description: The package name for the output nuget package.

options.name: --package-file
options.description: The package filename for the output nuget package.

options.name: --package-version
options.description: The package version for the output nuget package.

options.name: --manifest.regexp
options.description: The regular expression for matching the manifest.

options.name: --version.ignore
options.description: Ignore the manifest specific versions and use local version.

options.name: --version.lenient
options.description: Use the manifest specific versions, but fallback to use local versions.

options.name: --test
options.description: Test the executable runs and reports version information.
